description: Migrate all LLM calls from OpenAI to Google Gemini (gemini-2.5-pro) using langchain-google-genai.

userStories.title: Update System Configuration for Gemini
userStories.description: As a system operator, I want to configure the system to support Google Gemini so that the agent can authenticate with Google GenAI.
acceptanceCriteria: Then the model configuration supports specifying `gemini-2.5-pro`

tasks.description: Update `config/config.yaml` to set the default model to `gemini-2.5-pro` (and `temperature: 0` if applicable)
Update config loading utilities (if any) to expect `GOOGLE_API_KEY`

userStories.title: Refactor LLM Nodes to use ChatGoogleGenerativeAI
userStories.description: As a system, I want all LLM nodes to use Gemini so that the agent processes jobs using the updated model architecture.
acceptanceCriteria: Given the system is configured for Gemini
When the LangGraph nodes invoke an LLM
and Then all tests pass with the updated mocked GenAI class

tasks.description: Update all associated test files in `tests/` to expect `ChatGoogleGenerativeAI`
Run `uv run pytest` to ensure all tests pass
